channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NAVINFLUOR] Navin Fluorine International Ltd Receives ESG Rating Score of '67' from NSE Sustainability Ratings and Analytics Limited
item.description:
Navin Fluorine International Ltd has been assigned an ESG Rating score of ‘67’ by NSE Sustainability Ratings and Analytics Limited. The rating was assigned based on data available in the public domain, as the company has not engaged NSE Sustainability for ESG Rating. This information is being shared in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations and is also available on the company's website.

  • Navin Fluorine International Ltd receives an ESG Rating score of ‘67’ from NSE Sustainability Ratings and Analytics Limited
  • The rating was assigned based on publicly available data
  • The company did not engage NSE Sustainability for ESG Rating
  • This disclosure is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations
  • The rating can be accessed on NSE Sustainability's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Navin Fluorine International Limited-$ | Category: Transmission of Shares

item.title: [SAINIK] Sainik Finance & Industries Ltd: Promoters and Promoters Group Submit Disclosure for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Sainik Finance & Industries Ltd has received a disclosure from the promoters and promoters group for the year ended 31st March, 2026. The disclosure, submitted in compliance with Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulation, 2011, reveals that the promoters and promoters group hold 70.25% shareholding of the company, amounting to 7642948 Equity shares. The document also states that no encumbrance of these shares was made during the financial year ended on 31st March, 2026.

  • Sainik Finance & Industries Ltd receives disclosure from promoters and promoters group for FY 2025-2026
  • Disclosure submitted in compliance with Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulation, 2011
  • Promoters and promoters group hold 70.25% shareholding of the company
  • 7642948 Equity shares held by the promoters and promoters group
  • No encumbrance of these shares was made during the financial year ended on 31st March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAINIK FINANCE & INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [SETCO] Setco Automotive Ltd. Announces Extra-ordinary General Meeting for Transaction Approval
item.description:
Setco Automotive Ltd. has announced an Extra-ordinary General Meeting (EGM) to be held on Saturday, 25th April 2026 at 2:00 p.m. IST at the Registered Office of the Company at Baroda-Godhra Highway, Kalol (Panchmahals), Pin Code - 389 330, Gujarat, India. The EGM is to transact special business, including the approval of the Transaction and authorisation for finalisation and execution of the Transaction Documents. The Transaction Documents include a Share Purchase and Subscription Agreement, Shareholders’ Agreement, Non-Compete Agreement, Undertaking, and any other ancillary agreements. The Authorised Signatories are authorized to execute and deliver the Transaction Documents, including modifications and amendments, on behalf of the Company.

  • Setco Automotive Ltd. has called for an Extra-ordinary General Meeting (EGM)
  • The EGM is to be held on Saturday, 25th April 2026
  • The EGM will transact special business, including the approval of the Transaction and authorisation for finalisation and execution of the Transaction Documents
  • The Transaction Documents include a Share Purchase and Subscription Agreement, Shareholders’ Agreement, Non-Compete Agreement, Undertaking, and any other ancillary agreements
  • The Authorised Signatories are authorized to execute and deliver the Transaction Documents, including modifications and amendments, on behalf of the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SETCO AUTOMOTIVE LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [DACHEPALLI] Dachepalli Publishers Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Dachepalli Publishers Ltd, in compliance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company's Code of Conduct, has announced the closure of the 'Trading Window' for dealing in the securities of the company. The closure is for the Designated Persons, Connected Persons, and their immediate relatives from April 01, 2026 till 48 hours from the declaration of the audited financial results for the period ended March 31, 2026.

  • Dachepalli Publishers Ltd has closed the trading window for Designated Persons, Connected Persons, and their immediate relatives.
  • The closure is in compliance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company's Code of Conduct.
  • The trading window will be closed from April 01, 2026 till 48 hours from the declaration of the audited financial results for the period ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dachepalli Publishers Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [STYLEBAAZA] Baazar Style Retail Ltd Expands Retail Footprint with Two New Stores
item.description:
Baazar Style Retail Ltd has announced the opening of two new stores under its brand Style Baazar in Bhagalpur, Bihar and Falakata, West Bengal. This expansion brings the total number of stores to 264. The company is committed to providing quality products and services to its customers.

  • Baazar Style Retail Ltd has expanded its retail presence with two new Style Baazar stores.
  • The new stores are located in Bhagalpur, Bihar and Falakata, West Bengal.
  • This expansion brings the total number of stores to 264.
  • The company is dedicated to serving its customers with quality products and services.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Baazar Style Retail Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [DHARSUGAR] Dharani Sugars & Chemicals Ltd. Discloses Defaults on Loan Repayments Totaling INR 10.48 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dharani Sugars & Chemicals Ltd. has disclosed defaults on loan repayments and interest payments to banks and financial institutions, as well as unlisted debt securities. The total amount outstanding as of 31st March 2026 is INR 335.37 crores, with a default amount of INR 10.48 crores on loans from banks and financial institutions. There is no outstanding default on unlisted debt securities. This disclosure is in accordance with the SEBI circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CMDLICIR/P/2019740 dated 21st November 2019.

  • Dharani Sugars & Chemicals Ltd. discloses defaults on loan repayments
  • Total amount outstanding as of 31st March 2026 is INR 335.37 crores
  • Default amount on loans from banks and financial institutions is INR 10.48 crores
  • No outstanding default on unlisted debt securities
  • Disclosure made in accordance with SEBI circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CMDLICIR/P/2019740 dated 21st November 2019

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DHARANI SUGARS & CHEMICALS LTD. | Category: Loan

item.title: [AXISCADES] Axiscades Technologies Ltd Incorporates Wholly-Owned Subsidiary in Dubai, UAE
item.description:
Axiscades Technologies Ltd, a leading engineering solutions company, has incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary, AXISCADES Technologies Aviation Equipment Engineering Services LLC, in Dubai, UAE on April 02, 2026. The new subsidiary, which has a capital of Dhirams 150,000, is aimed at exploring new business opportunities in this geography. The company is yet to commence its business operations.

  • Axiscades Technologies Ltd incorporates a wholly-owned subsidiary in Dubai, UAE
  • Subsidiary named AXISCADES Technologies Aviation Equipment Engineering Services LLC
  • Capital of the subsidiary is Dhirams 150,000
  • New subsidiary aims to explore new business opportunities in the geography
  • Subsidiary is yet to commence its business operations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Axiscades Technologies Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SHARDFI] Eco Hotels And Resorts Ltd to Approve Audited Financial Results on April 10, 2026
item.description:
Eco Hotels And Resorts Ltd has announced a Board Meeting on April 10, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results (Standalone & Consolidated) along with Auditors Report and Statement of Assets & Liabilities and Cash Flow Statement of the Company for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window shall remain closed till 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results.

  • Eco Hotels And Resorts Ltd to consider and approve Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window to remain closed till 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHARAD FIBRES & YARN PROCESSORS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NEPHROPLUS] Nephrocare Health Services Ltd Appoints Prashant Vinodkumar Goenka as Chief Risk Officer
item.description:
Nephrocare Health Services Ltd has designated Mr. Prashant Vinodkumar Goenka, the Chief Financial Officer, as the Chief Risk Officer (CRO) of the company with immediate effect. The appointment was made by the Board of Directors through a circular resolution dated April 03, 2026. Prashant Vinodkumar Goenka has been associated with the company since May 7, 2024, and has over 20 years of experience in financial services. He holds a bachelor's degree in engineering and a master's degree in science from Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani, and a master’s of business administration from the University of Chicago, Booth School of Business, United States.

  • Mr. Prashant Vinodkumar Goenka designated as Chief Risk Officer of Nephrocare Health Services Ltd.
  • Appointment made by the Board of Directors through a circular resolution dated April 03, 2026.
  • Prashant Vinodkumar Goenka has over 20 years of experience in financial services.
  • He holds a bachelor's degree in engineering and a master's degree in science from Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani.
  • He also holds a master’s of business administration from the University of Chicago, Booth School of Business, United States.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nephrocare Health Services Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [LATENTVIEW] Latent View Analytics Ltd Receives ESG Rating of '70' from NSE Sustainability
item.description:
Latent View Analytics Ltd has been assigned an ESG Rating of ‘70’ by NSE Sustainability Ratings and Analytics Limited (NSE ESG). This rating has been independently prepared by NSE ESG based on data pertaining to the Company available in the public domain, without any engagement from the Company's side. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations and SEBI Master Circular SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024.

  • Latent View Analytics Ltd receives an ESG Rating of '70' from NSE Sustainability Ratings and Analytics Limited.
  • The rating is based on publicly available data without any engagement from the Company's side.
  • This disclosure is in accordance with SEBI Listing Regulations and SEBI Master Circular dated November 11, 2024.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Latent View Analytics Ltd | Category: Transmission of Shares
